ssl_viewer.telemetry¶

Classes

TargetTelemetry(az_deg, el_deg[, ...])

Planar-array telemetry convention.
class ssl_viewer.telemetry.TargetTelemetry(az_deg: float, el_deg: float, confidence: float = 1.0, target_id: int = 1, ts_ns: int = 0, version: int = 1)[source]¶

Bases: object

Planar-array telemetry convention.

az_deg:

Array azimuth in the local x-y plane, counter-clockwise from +x. Range: [-180, 180].

el_deg:

Array elevation above the local x-y plane toward +z. Range: [0, 90].

Local array axes used by this viewer:

+x = in-plane reference axis shown by the arrow +y = in-plane axis 90 deg CCW from +x +z = array normal / up

az_deg: float¶
confidence: float¶
el_deg: float¶

classmethod from_json_bytes(payload: bytes) → TargetTelemetry[source]¶

to_json_bytes() → bytes[source]¶
